Day of surgery. Hotel after dark, hard to open mouth. Blood. Started antibiotic and narcotics that dull my emotional experience. Need hugs.
Red outline around gland, big "drip" leak. Start of infection? Blood in drain is now minimal.
Redness down, no infection! Gland feels hard.
Off of pain medicine today. Blood has collected at the top of the tube.
Lots of sleeping. Sigona's Market olive oil is exquisite.
Drainage is increasing, but facial inflammation is going down. Fluid is clear, not cloudy.
Tylenol managing pain well, but hurts in-between dosages. More sleep.
Some leaking, resolves with milking the drain. It hurts a lot. First time walking outside. For maybe a few hundred feet. I tried.
There are little white bits in output. Vanessa pieces. There is a lot leaking from the drain site today, so not sure this is accurate. It could be it is time to come out.
